title: e2e: fix race condition (kube play + logs)
body:
The usual bug that we always seem to forget about: "kube play"
needs "podman wait" before we can "podman logs". (And, reminder,
"kube play --wait" is worthless because it destroys containers).

Reference: #18074, the original PR that fixed a bunch of these flakes.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
...and [this is why](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4684748522520576/html/int-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-play-kube-with-build-Check-that-command-is-expanded--1):
```
           # podman [options] logs echo_pod-foobar

           [FAILED] Expected
               <string>: 
           to equal
               <string>: parenBAR braceBAR dollardollarparenGOT-HERE interpBARolate
```
